title: Baby Hair Comb, 3PCS Baby Hair Brush and Comb Set, Baby Hair Brush Toddler Comb for Newborns & Toddlers, Perfect Baby Registry Gift (Blue)
features: 【Safe&Soft Material】Our baby hair brush set is made of soft nylon bristles, BPA free. You can gently brush your baby's hair and massage his scalp for grooming and relaxation. It provides excellent care for your baby's head and scalp.

【Baby Hair Comb】 Brushing your baby's hair every day can help your baby promote blood circulation and relax before a good night's sleep. Our baby brush has spherical teeth that won't pull or damage baby's hair or scalp. Provides a safe and easy grooming experience.

【Cradle Cap Brush】Massaging your baby's scalp with a soft bristle cradle cap brush every day can prevent the accumulation of cradle cap and protect their soft parts. The handle between your fingers makes it easy to hold and move around while bathing.

【Multifunctional】Great for baby's sensitive skin, but also for other family members! ANYONE CAN USE - Our facial cleansing brush is perfect for the whole family as a massage cleanser for babies and toddlers, or mom can use it as a facial brush to gently exfoliate dry skin.

【Perfect Gift】This baby hair brush and comb set meets every parent's need for grooming their baby's hair, buy this set for your own baby, or as a gift for a friend's baby shower, thoughtful and practical.
description: Features: 👶Spherical tooth design, safe care for the skin. 👶The cradle cap brush prevents cradle cap buildup. 👶Combs, silicone brushes set meet daily needs. 👶Makes a great baby shower/registry gift. Specifications: Material: Nylon+PP Size: Baby hair brush: 6.5*5cm Baby comb: 7.8*6cm Packing List: Comb*1, Silicone brush*1 Notice: Due to manual measurement, there may be some size errors; Due to the shooting environment, there may be some color difference.
